creators.name: Andrej Karpathy

creators.editor_note: Business- en marketingtoepassingen: AI agent armies, repeatable workflows met Skills. Schaalbare commerciële uses.

creators.editor_note: Open-source AI agent builder (OpenClaw). Authentieke posts over agentic engineering — grounded en praktisch.
